items.name: Critter on the Shoulder
items.description:
Claim this exclusive shoulder pet, the cute "Critter" from the movie Lydia and the Mist Rider.

Starting March 3rd, you can earn this limited-edition treasure by venturing into Fracterra to celebrate the launch of the movie in theaters. 

Master the art of Astromagic, join Lydia’s crew, and defeat the Spellbinder in the ultimate final battle to unlock your reward. 

Visit Fracterra : https://www.roblox.com/games/18752369972/Fracterra-RP to begin your quest!

items.name: Glowing knight helmet
items.description: This eerie helm radiates an otherworldly glow, with horns that shimmer in the dark. Perfect for warriors who have transcended mortal realms, it adds a hauntingly cool vibe to your Roblox avatar. Lead the charge with spectral power and strike fear into the hearts of your foes as you conquer the battlefield from beyond the grave!

items.name: [PBR] 🎭🦊 Golden Cursed Japanese Kitsune Mask
items.description:
[PBR LIMITED]
SHINY ✨

🛑 Available in other colors:

🎭🦊 Azure-Silver: https://www.roblox.com/catalog/126257726812265
🎭🦊 Dark-black: https://www.roblox.com/catalog/117924534020876
🎭🦊 White-red: https://www.roblox.com/catalog/96741459988439
🎭🦊 White-cyan: https://www.roblox.com/catalog/78596013563981
🎭🦊 White-black: https://www.roblox.com/catalog/123303015034563

The Kitsune mask, with its sly grin and piercing eyes, draws directly from the heart of Japanese mythology.
Kitsune (狐) — the fox spirit — is a shapeshifting yōkai, known for its cunning, magic, and mysterious duality.
While some Kitsune are benevolent messengers of the kami Inari, others become tricksters, or even vengeful spirits when wronged.

Made by wyssion
All rights reserved.

More from Aluvion UGC: https://www.roblox.com/catalog?Category=1&CreatorName=Aluvion+UGC&salesTypeFilter=1&SortType=3&IncludeNotForSale

items.name: Raw Darkness Vultures Hat
items.description:
Collab between Hyacinth UGC and Aeteris Fantasy
Purchase HERE: https://www.roblox.com/games/72687221433834/Exclusives-Limiteds-Hub
-
A hat worn by members of a pop group, many decades ago. This hat was customized for a performance of their hit song, Vulture. After their song rose to fame again due to the viral dance circulating on social media, official hats from the performance were created in honor of the song's resurgence decades later. The hat features a black fabric base, with high-quality resin pieces placed on top, most notably the vulture skull and the bone horns. The rims of the hat are adorned with metal-like spikes placed carefully around them. Lastly, the hat was textured to have a grungy, dark black metal look. Buy some of these hats for yourself!
-

items.name: Blueberrinni Octopusini
items.description:
🫐🐙 Blueberrinni Octopusini 🐙🫐

From the sparkling Blueberry Seas 🌊✨ comes Blueberrinni Octopusini — the sweetest, splashiest little legend to ever pop into Pop Box! 💙🎉

With shimmering blueberry-blue tentacles 🫐💫 and a bubbly personality that pops with energy 💥😆, this ocean cutie loves bouncing, spinning, and celebrating every big win! 🏆🎊 Rumor says each tentacle holds a tiny burst of lucky pop power… but only true Pop Box players can unlock it! 🎯🔥

Dripping in berry sparkle ✨🫧 and ocean magic 🌊🔮, Blueberrinni Octopusini isn’t just adorable — it’s a badge of honor for dedicated pop masters! 💙👑

🌟 LIMITED TIME
🎮 ONLY in Pop Box
🚫 Nowhere else

Catch it before it swims back to the deep blue! 🌊⏳🐙
